title: 1989 Upper Deck - Star Rookie Ken Griffey Jr #1 (RC) Auto PSA Auto 10
description: The product is a 1989 Upper Deck Ken Griffey Jr #1 (RC) autographed trading card, graded PSA 10. This card features a hard-signed autograph from Ken Griffey Jr, who is a baseball player for the Seattle Mariners. The card is an original release by Upper Deck and is part of the 1989 MLB World Series set. It is a valuable collectible for fans of Ken Griffey Jr and baseball trading card enthusiasts.

title: 2024 Topps Holiday - Paul Skenes #H165 Blue Christmas Card (RC)
description: The product is a 2024 Topps Holiday baseball trading card featuring Paul Skenes of the Pittsburgh Pirates. This particular card is part of the Blue Metallic Glitter parallel variety, making it a rare and unique addition to any collection. As a rookie card from the Topps manufacturer, it holds value for collectors looking for up-and-coming players in Major League Baseball. The card number is H165, representing the 165th card in the set for the 2024 season.

title: DC Batman Family "Murder in the Night" No. 481 January 1979 Vintage Comic
description: This vintage comic book from January 1979, featuring the DC Batman Family, is a must-have for collectors and fans of classic comics. The storyline, "Murder in the Night," is part of the Batman: Family series and showcases the iconic character, The Batman, as he navigates a crime-filled Gotham City. Set during the Bronze Age of comics, this US comic book from DC Comics is a valuable addition to any collection, especially for those interested in the Justice League of America and the DC Universe.

title: DC Comics Detective Comics Beware the Night of the Batman #451 September 1975
description: The product is a vintage comic book titled "Detective Comics Beware the Night of the Batman #451" from September 1975, featuring characters such as Night, Bat-Man, and Detective in the DC Universe. Written by Bob Rozakis and illustrated by Terry Austin, with a cover by Dick Giordano, this single issue falls under the genre of superheroes and comics. Published by DC Comics, this comic book is part of the Bronze Age era of US Comics and showcases the Justice League of America superhero team. A collectible item for fans of comic books and memorabilia.

title: Detective Comics #447 (DC Comics May 1975)
description: The product is a vintage Detective Comics #447 comic book from May 1975, featuring a storyline written by Len Wein and illustrated by Bob Rozakis, Ernie Chan, A. Martinez, Jose Massaroli, and Dick Giordano. The comic book includes appearances by characters such as Alfred Pennyworth, Clark Kent (Superman), Robin (Dick Grayson), Bat-Man, and The Creeper (Jack Ryder). With a cover by Dick Giordano and Tatjana Wood, this single issue from the Bronze Age era is a collectible piece of comic book history within the DC Universe universe, published by DC Comics in English language.

specifics.Artist/Writer: Len Wein, Bob Rozakis, Ernie Chan, A. Martinez, José Massaroli, Dick Giordano
specifics.Character: Alfred Pennyworth, Robin (Dick Grayson), Shirley Middleman, Fred Taylor, The Creeper (Jack Ryder), Creeper (Jack Ryder), Morris Middleman, Batman (Bruce Wayne), Chief Frank McDonald, Clark Kent (Superman) (Cameo), Bat-Man

title: Marvel Comics Special Edition #2 Star Wars The Empire Strikes Back Oversized
description: The product is a special edition comic book titled "Marvel Comics Special Edition #2 Star Wars The Empire Strikes Back Oversized" published by Marvel Comics in 1980. This single issue features characters and artwork related to the Star Wars universe, specifically focusing on the Empire Strikes Back storyline. With a focus on war and comics, this collectible item is part of the US Comics tradition and offers fans of the franchise a unique and larger-than-life edition to add to their collection.

specifics.Series Title: Star Wars: the Empire Strikes Back

title: Terrance Marshall Jr 2021 prestige - NFL Passport Signatures
description: The Terrance Marshall Jr 2021 prestige trading card is a sought-after collectible featuring an autograph from the rising NFL star. This card, part of the 2021 Panini Prestige set, showcases the player's signature on a standard card stock material. The autograph is authenticated by Panini Authentic and adds significant value to the card for fans of the Carolina Panthers and football enthusiasts alike. This original sports trading card captures a moment in the career of Terrance Marshall Jr, making it a desirable item for collectors looking to own a piece of football history.

specifics.Player/Athlete: Terrace Marshall Jr, Terrance Marshall Jr

title: The Invincible Iron Man: Ultimo Unleashed, 1977 #95
description: The product is a vintage comic book titled "The Invincible Iron Man: Ultimo Unleashed" from 1977. It features the characters Iron Man (Tony Stark), Ultimo, and Ultimo (Villain) within the Marvel Universe (MCU). The comic book is part of the US Comics tradition and published by Marvel Comics, with artwork by Al Milgrom and Jack Kirby. It is a single issue in English language and belongs to the Bronze Age era of superhero comics, making it a valuable collectible for fans of the Avengers superhero team and superhero genre in general.

specifics.Artist/Writer: Bill Mantlo, George Tuska, Don Perlin, Gerry Conway, Don Warfield
specifics.Character: IRONMAN, Ultimo, Ultimo (Villain), Iron Man (Tony Stark)
